title: American Stew Recipe
description: A hearty American stew made with tender beef and vegetables, perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: 1. Heat the stew meat in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
2. Add the onion, carrot, and potato to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the beef broth, water, salt, and pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
4. Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
5. Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
